title: Procurement Manager / Procurement Executive / Logistics Supervisor
required_skills: Bachelor's Degree in Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, or related field
Proven experience in procurement, purchasing, or supply chain management
Strong negotiation and vendor management skills
Experience with ERP and procurement management systems
matched_skills: Business Administration degree (Management Administration Bachelor's — partial match)
Vendor management: managed external vendors and channel partners at IPC (IoT/IT Marketing Manager)
Analytical and strategic planning: market analysis, competitive research, GTM strategy across multiple roles
Communication and organisational skills: confirmed across multiple roles
missing_skills: Procurement or purchasing function experience (no procurement role in CV)
ERP or procurement management system experience
Contract negotiation for supply chain context
Experience with supplier performance monitoring and sourcing
core_responsibilities: Develop and implement procurement strategies for cost savings and efficiency
Source, evaluate, and negotiate with suppliers and vendors
Manage supplier relationships and monitor performance
Ensure timely procurement of materials, products, and services
Monitor procurement budgets and control purchasing costs
Supervise warehouse and logistics operations (Logistics Supervisor track)
recommended_emphasis: This role is a poor match — application is not recommended
The candidate's vendor management at IPC is tangentially related but not procurement/supply chain
No ERP or procurement system experience is a critical gap
Logistics and warehouse operations are completely outside the candidate's background
summary: Match score 22.2% — poor match. This procurement and logistics role requires supply chain expertise, ERP systems, and operational procurement experience that the candidate lacks. The candidate has peripheral vendor management experience from a marketing context but no genuine procurement, purchasing, or logistics operations background. Application is not recommended.
